name: ICM job status by process ID
description: Synthetic read-only status lookup for one ICM job process.
sql_text: SELECT request_id, process_id, ess_request_id, job_name, api_operation, status, started_at, ended_at, elapsed_minutes, region, workstream, business_period, sql_id, plan_hash_value, udq_name, udq_hash FROM mock_icm_job_status WHERE process_id = :process_id

name: ICM job history by job name and API
description: Synthetic history rows for comparable ICM job runs.
sql_text: SELECT request_id, process_id, ess_request_id, job_name, api_operation, status, started_at, ended_at, elapsed_minutes, region, workstream, business_period FROM mock_icm_job_history WHERE job_name = :job_name AND api_operation = :api_operation

name: CalculatePVT run history
description: Synthetic CalculatePVT history for baseline candidate analysis.
sql_text: SELECT request_id, process_id, ess_request_id, job_name, api_operation, status, started_at, ended_at, elapsed_minutes, region, workstream, business_period FROM mock_icm_job_history WHERE api_operation = :api_operation AND region = :region

name: ICM volume snapshot by period and scope
description: Synthetic business volume metrics for a run.
sql_text: SELECT run_key, metric_name, metric_value, baseline_value, unit, shape_tags FROM mock_icm_volume_snapshot WHERE run_key = :run_key AND region = :region AND workstream = :workstream

name: ICM SQL observation by SQL_ID
description: Synthetic SQL_ID, plan hash, SQL profile, wait, and row-volume metadata.
sql_text: SELECT run_key, sql_id, plan_hash_value, child_number, sql_profile, module, action, elapsed_time_delta, buffer_gets_delta, rows_processed_delta, top_wait_event, udq_name, udq_hash, query_shape_tags, index_profile_notes, recommendation_text FROM mock_icm_sql_observation WHERE sql_id = :sql_id AND run_key = :run_key

name: ICM UDQ metadata by name and hash
description: Synthetic UDQ metadata including APJ OR predicate risk tags.
sql_text: SELECT run_key, sql_id, plan_hash_value, udq_name, udq_hash, query_shape_tags, index_profile_notes, recommendation_text FROM mock_icm_udq_metadata WHERE udq_name = :udq_name AND udq_hash = :udq_hash AND run_key = :run_key

name: ICM active long-running jobs
description: Synthetic active long-running job discovery query.
sql_text: SELECT request_id, process_id, ess_request_id, job_name, api_operation, status, started_at, ended_at, elapsed_minutes, region, workstream, business_period, sql_id, plan_hash_value, udq_name, udq_hash FROM mock_icm_active_long_running WHERE elapsed_minutes >= :minimum_elapsed_minutes

name: APJ Direct CalculatePVT regression story
description: Synthetic APJ/Direct example: 350m prior baseline, 12h+ current run, changed UDQ hash, changed plan, SQL profile/index intervention, OR predicate risk against HZ_REF_ENTITIES / EXTN_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER007.
sql_text: SELECT run_key, sql_id, plan_hash_value, child_number, sql_profile, module, action, elapsed_time_delta, buffer_gets_delta, rows_processed_delta, top_wait_event, udq_name, udq_hash, query_shape_tags, index_profile_notes, recommendation_text FROM mock_icm_sql_observation WHERE sql_id = :sql_id AND run_key = :run_key

name: Diagnostic active session by ECID
description: Synthetic active GV$SESSION collector for ECID slow-job diagnostics.
sql_text: SELECT ecid, inst_id, sid, status, last_call_et, sql_id, module, action FROM mock_diagnostic_active_session WHERE ecid = :ecid

name: Diagnostic SQL hotspots by ECID
description: Synthetic SQL hotspot ranking for an ECID.
sql_text: SELECT ecid, sql_id, ash_samples, elapsed_seconds, cpu_seconds, wait_seconds FROM mock_diagnostic_sql_hotspots WHERE ecid = :ecid

name: Diagnostic SQL stats by SQL_ID
description: Synthetic GV$SQL-style execution, elapsed, CPU, and wait metrics.
sql_text: SELECT sql_id, plan_hash_value, executions, elapsed_seconds, cpu_seconds, buffer_gets, top_wait_event FROM mock_diagnostic_sqlstats WHERE sql_id = :sql_id

name: Diagnostic ASH by ECID
description: Synthetic ASH sample collector for ECID correlation.
sql_text: SELECT ecid, sample_time, sql_id, event, wait_class, inst_id FROM mock_diagnostic_ash WHERE ecid = :ecid

name: Diagnostic AWR plan history
description: Synthetic AWR plan-history comparison for a SQL_ID.
sql_text: SELECT sql_id, plan_hash_value, index_name, cost, cardinality_rows, first_seen_at FROM mock_diagnostic_awr_plan_history WHERE sql_id = :sql_id

name: Diagnostic plan comparison
description: Synthetic current-versus-historical plan comparison.
sql_text: SELECT sql_id, current_plan_hash, historical_plan_hash, current_index, historical_index, cost_ratio FROM mock_diagnostic_plan_comparison WHERE sql_id = :sql_id

name: Diagnostic source search
description: Synthetic sanitized DBA_SOURCE pattern search for generated package evidence.
sql_text: SELECT package_name, value_set_code, sanitized_pattern FROM mock_diagnostic_source_search WHERE value_set_code = :value_set_code

name: Diagnostic formula metadata
description: Synthetic formula/value-set metadata exposure collector.
sql_text: SELECT package_name, value_set_code, sql_id, confirmed_affected FROM mock_diagnostic_formula_metadata WHERE value_set_code = :value_set_code

name: Diagnostic formula duplication count
description: Synthetic duplicate-key count for generated formula lookup behavior.
sql_text: SELECT ess_request_id, total_lines, distinct_keys, redundant_call_pct FROM mock_diagnostic_formula_duplication WHERE ess_request_id = :ess_request_id

name: Diagnostic blocking session check
description: Synthetic blocking-session rule-out collector.
sql_text: SELECT ecid, blocking_session, blocking_instance, status FROM mock_diagnostic_blocking_session WHERE ecid = :ecid

name: Diagnostic RAC gc wait distribution
description: Synthetic RAC gc wait distribution collector for rule-out analysis.
sql_text: SELECT ecid, sql_id, gc_wait_samples, total_samples FROM mock_diagnostic_rac_gc_waits WHERE ecid = :ecid

name: Active DB session by ECID or client identifier
description: Maps a slow job to GV$SESSION/GV$INSTANCE placement by ECID, client identifier, SQL_ID, module, or action.
sql_text: SELECT inst_id, instance_name, db_host_name, sid, serial_number, session_status, username, service_name, module, action, client_identifier, ecid, machine, program, process, sql_id, sql_child_number, sql_exec_start, last_call_et_seconds, event, wait_class, state, blocking_instance, blocking_session, plan_hash_value FROM mock_topology_active_db_session WHERE ((:ecid IS NOT NULL AND ecid = :ecid) OR (:client_identifier IS NOT NULL AND client_identifier = :client_identifier) OR (:sql_id IS NOT NULL AND sql_id = :sql_id) OR (:module_like IS NOT NULL AND module LIKE :module_like) OR (:action_like IS NOT NULL AND action LIKE :action_like))

name: Active DB session by ESS request
description: Fallback session placement lookup when ECID is missing and ESS request or process identifiers are available.
sql_text: SELECT inst_id, instance_name, db_host_name, sid, serial_number, session_status, service_name, module, action, client_identifier, ecid, machine, program, process, sql_id, sql_child_number, sql_exec_start, last_call_et_seconds, event, wait_class, state, plan_hash_value FROM mock_topology_active_db_session WHERE (:ess_request_token IS NOT NULL AND client_identifier LIKE :ess_request_token) OR (:process_id IS NOT NULL AND process = :process_id) OR (:program_like IS NOT NULL AND program LIKE :program_like)

name: ASH samples by ECID or SQL_ID
description: Optional ASH collector for mapping job activity across RAC instance, wait class, event, and time.
sql_text: SELECT sample_time, inst_id, instance_name, db_host_name, sql_id, wait_class, event, session_state, ash_samples FROM mock_topology_ash_samples WHERE (:ecid IS NOT NULL AND ecid = :ecid) OR (:sql_id IS NOT NULL AND sql_id = :sql_id)

name: Node wait heat by time bucket
description: Builds the server-time heat map from synthetic ASH buckets grouped by instance, host, wait class, and event.
sql_text: SELECT bucket_start, bucket_end, inst_id, instance_name, db_host_name, wait_class, event, ash_samples, active_slow_job_count, top_sql_id FROM mock_topology_node_wait_heat WHERE bucket_start >= :from_at AND bucket_end <= :to_at

name: Instance health snapshot
description: Returns DB instance/host health summary: active sessions, waits, active SQL count, top SQL_ID, and top event.
sql_text: SELECT inst_id, instance_name, db_host_name, active_sessions, cpu_wait_samples, io_wait_samples, concurrency_wait_samples, application_wait_samples, cluster_wait_samples, active_sql_count, top_sql_id, top_event FROM mock_topology_instance_health WHERE inst_id = :inst_id

name: Blocking session check by ECID or SQL_ID
description: Checks whether a slow job is blocked or waiting on another session.
sql_text: SELECT ecid, sql_id, blocking_instance, blocking_session, blocking_status, evidence_summary FROM mock_topology_blocking_session WHERE (:ecid IS NOT NULL AND ecid = :ecid) OR (:sql_id IS NOT NULL AND sql_id = :sql_id)

name: App server inference from session metadata
description: Infers middleware/client server from session MACHINE, PROGRAM, MODULE, ACTION, CLIENT_IDENTIFIER, and ECID.
sql_text: SELECT machine, program, module, action, client_identifier, ecid, inferred_server_name, inference_confidence, evidence_summary FROM mock_topology_app_server_inference WHERE (:client_identifier IS NOT NULL AND client_identifier = :client_identifier) OR (:ecid IS NOT NULL AND ecid = :ecid)
